title: Raytheon stock extends pullback after profit beat expectations but sales missed
text: Shares of Raytheon Technologies Corp. RTX, -0.88% slipped 0.7% in premarket trading Tuesday, putting them on track for a fourth-straight loss, after the aerospace and defense company reported first-quarter profit that beat expectations but revenue that missed, and provided a mixed outlook. Net income rose to $1.08 billion, or 72 cents a share, from $753 million, or 50 cents a share, in the year-ago period.

title: Raytheon cuts revenue forecast on impact from Russia business suspension
text: Aerospace and defense firm Raytheon Technologies Corp lowered its full-year revenue forecast on Tuesday, hurt by the cessation of its activities in Russia.
